summary: Admin Work list now uses a single DTO projection over stored PublicThumbnailUrl instead of loading full Work entities, Assets, and WorkVideos.
correctnessGuards: Admin Work list projection test asserts WorkThumbnailUrlResolver result equals projected ThumbnailUrl for explicit thumbnail assets.
Create Work endpoint test asserts stored PublicThumbnailUrl equals WorkThumbnailUrlResolver result for the uploaded thumbnail asset.
notChanged: No Real Backend Test target selection changed
No public list pageSize behavior changed
No public endpoint DTO contract changed
No public video/body thumbnail fallback reintroduced
risks: Admin list relies on PublicThumbnailUrl being populated by write/bootstrap paths; direct out-of-band DB writes can still create stale stored URLs.
This slice does not directly affect public k6 targets because admin list is not in the real backend load mix.
recommendation: Promote through dev and main after the corrected equivalence guard is pushed and CI is green.
